title: Lota | Bodna | Toilet Wash Jug | 2.25 litres | Plastic (Grey)
features: USES: An eco-friendly toilet paper substitute ideal for cleansing one’s personal area after using the toilet, post-natal care for women and more.
DESIGN: Easily fits under most bathroom taps for filling, has a grooved handle for added comfort and is lightweight (125 grams) making it ideal for young children and elderly adults.
QUALITY: Made from lightweight, durable impact-resistant plastic (HDPE).
GUARANTEE: Our quality toilet wash jugs are made in Bangladesh and come with our 100% customer satisfaction guarantee.
description: Product Description Why choose Mayaka786? Our jugs are custom made from high quality, durable, impact-resistant plastic (HDPE), ensuring their longevity! We’re pleased to know our jugs help curb toilet paper waste which in turn reduces a negative environmental impact throughout the world. If you’re looking for a quality toilet wash jug that lasts, is lightweight and helps to reduce your environmental impact, then ours is right for you. If you’re looking for a quality toilet wash jug that lasts, is lightweight and helps to reduce your environmental impact, then our lota/bodna is right for you. Why choose Mayaka786? Toilet wash jugs are a friendly way to help the environment, to provide cleanliness and good hygiene after using the toilet and are a great alternative to toilet paper. Did you know creating a typical toilet roll takes nearly 6 ounces of wood, 1,300 watts of power and 45 gallons of water? Toilet wash jugs are simply more cost-effective, provide a better cleaning result, are better for plumbing, sewers, and sceptic tanks and importantly are kinder to the environment. Better cleanliness Superior hygiene Good for the environment Cost-savings Simple to use Reusable
